name: gdpr-uk
description: UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018 compliance toolkit for reviews, document drafting, DSAR workflows, and citation-rich advisory answers.

interface.longDescription: Review code and data flows, draft UK privacy documents, handle subject access requests, and answer UK data-protection questions using the bundled legal references, templates, and primary sources.
defaultPrompt: Review this code or data flow for UK GDPR risks.
Draft or review this UK privacy document.
Help me handle this UK subject access request.
